reference: I have a lower back and knee problem. I have constant pain in my lower back and all around my knee area. The pain also shoots down to my legs, and my knee makes a cracking sound when I bend down or perform squats. I have seen several doctors and an American orthopedic specialist and gone through temporary physical therapy, but it did not help. My email is yyyy@yyyy.
text: I have a lower back and knee problem. I have constant pain in my lower back and all around my knee area. The pain also shoots down to my legs, and my knee makes a cracking sound when I bend down or perform squats. I have seen several doctors and an American orthopedic specialist, and gone through temporary physical therapy, but it did not help. My email is lovemina at love timely, Texas, and.
